title: melicope zambalensis
intro: Melicope zambalensis, also known as Zambalene, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Melicope zambalensis include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Melicope zambalensis can be prepared as a herbal medicine through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
